channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Japanese envoy eyes closer links with Gweru
item.description: Patrick Chitumba THE Japanese Ambassador to Zimbabwe, Maekawa Nobutaka, has pledged to strengthen cooperation between Japan and Gweru through business partnerships and sister-city arrangements, describing the Midlands capital as... via Ebusiness Weekly #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Zimbabwe ‘thirsty’ for Chibuku Super
item.description: Tapiwa Chirume ZIMBABWEANS have just smashed a 28-year Chibuku Super record! With a record 4.62 million hectolitres of the much loved brew... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Subscriptions via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: China commits to deeper lithium value addition partnership with Zim
item.description: Bongani Ndlovu in Beijing, China THERE should be deeper cooperation between Zimbabwe and China in the extraction and value addition of critical minerals such as lithium, with the partnership being... via Ebusiness Weekly #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Nyaradzo Buys Glen Forest Cemetery, Plans Luxury-Style Memorial Park In Harare
item.description: Nyaradzo Buys Glen Forest Cemetery, Unveils Luxury-Style Memorial Park Plans Zimbabwe’s leading funeral assurance company, The Nyaradzo Group, has bought Glen Forest Cemetery and announced plans to transform it into the new Sahwira Glen Forest Memorial Park, a modern memorial est via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Teenage Hadebe’s Staggering US Salary Makes Him One Of Zimbabwe’s Best-Paid Players
item.description: Teenage Hadebe: How Much The Warriors Defender Earns In The US Zimbabwe Warriors defender Teenage Hadebe is earning millions in the United States after his Major League Soccer (MLS) salary details were revealed in the league’s 2026 salary guide. The figures released by the Major via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Deschamps unveils France’s star-studded World Cup squad and hands Robin Risser surprise call-up
item.description: France coach Didier Deschamps assembled a squad with formidable attacking talent for the World Cup and rewarded goalkeeper Robin Risser with a call-up for the showpiece tournament on Thursday following his breakthrough season. Risser, who plays for Lens, has been one of the revel via The Zimbabwe Mail #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: After the Kendrick Lamar beef, can Drake come back with ‘Iceman’? @kendricklamar
item.description: NEW YORK — Drake has returned as the “Iceman.” And the stakes couldn’t be higher. His ninth studio album — and his first since his extravagant loss in a very public feud with Kendrick Lamar — arrives Friday. The beef between two of hip-hop’s biggest stars erupted in the spring of via The Zimbabwe Mail #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: From Harare to Ephesus: Where History Met Faith for Zimbabwean Men on Pilgrimage
item.description: By Dr Masimba Mavaza Ephesus, Turkey – Today, a group of Zimbabwean men from England walked out of history books... Continue reading "From Harare to Ephesus: Where History Met Faith for Zimbabwean Men on Pilgrimage" via Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Kavango raises Zimbabwe pension fund stake as Nara Gold acquisition advances @nehandaradio
item.description: Kavango Resources plc is increasing Zimbabwean pension fund participation in the company through a new share issuance as it continues efforts to finalise its acquisition of the Nara Gold Project. The post Kavango raises Zimbabwe pension fund stake as Nara Gold acquisition advance via Nehanda Radio #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: The ZEP Trap: Why South Africa’s New Permit Extensions Could Be a Deportation Time Bomb
item.description: For hundreds of thousands of Zimbabweans living and working in South Africa, the recent announcement extending the Zimbabwe Exemption Permit (ZEP) to May 2027 might have initially felt like a significant reprieve. Yet, beneath the surface of this apparent concession lies a chilli via My Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Luke Malaba’s Final Bow: The Secret ‘Constitutional Deals’ That Kept the Chief Justice in Power
item.description: Harare – As Chief Justice Luke Malaba finally prepares to vacate his high-profile office on 14 May 2026, the celebratory headlines mask a decade of judicial turbulence that has shaken the foundations of Zimbabwean democracy. This article goes far beyond the official retirement an via My Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News
